allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({path:'.env.local'}\); console.log\('URL:', process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL\); console.log\('Project ref:', \(process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL||''\).match\(/https:\\/\\/\([^.]+\)/\)?.[1]\); console.log\('Anon key prefix:', \(process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY||''\).slice\(0,20\)\); console.log\('Svc key prefix:', \(process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY||''\).slice\(0,20\)\);")
